title: Exallage buruensis
taxonomy: Exallage buruensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to the island of Buru in Indonesia. Exallage buruensis is classified as a species of the genus Exallage, which is a group of flowering plants within the family Rubiaceae. The classification of Exallage buruensis is based on its morphological and molecular characteristics. Further research is needed to confirm its classification and relationships within the Rubiaceae family.
